title: How al-Rabic b. Ziyad al-Harithi died
description: I was told by 'Umar-'Ali b. Muhammad: Al-Rabi' b. Ziyad was governor of Khurasan for two years and several months and died in the year in which Ziyad died. He had appointed his son 'Abdallah b. al-Rabi ' as his successor. The latter was governor for two months and then he died. Al-Rabi"s letter of appointment from Ziyad reached Khurasan after he had been buried. 'Abdallah b. al-Rabi' appointed Khulayd b. 'Abdallah al-Hanafi as his successor over Khurasan. (According to) 'Ali-Muhammad b. al-Fadl -his father: I heard that al-Rabi' b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 18
